case_title: SANTOS BACAB VS. CIRO ALEJANDRO GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BACAB, SANTOS AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, CIRO ALEJANDRO AS AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BACAB, SANTOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, CIRO ALEJANDRO AS AN INDIVIDUAL $4,115.01 PRINCIPAL, $21.86 INTEREST, $135.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,272.17, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
